verses.text: Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang Filistia gamsungah kha sagih sung om hi
Tua ciangin Filistia-te in siampite leh aisante sam uh a, “ Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang bang cih ding ihi hiam? Ama omna munah bang tawh kha ding ihi hiam, hong gen un,” a ci uh hi

Amaute in, “Israel-te' Pasian' Thuciamna Singkuang na puakkhiat uh leh, a hawm guakin puak kei un. Bangbang hita leh mawhna hanga biakna pia un. Tua ciangin note na dam ding uh a, note hong gawtna thu na thei ding uh hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua ciangin amaute in, “Amah i piak ding mawhna hanga biakna bang ahi hiam?” a ci uh hi. Amaute in dawngin, “Filistia uliante a phazah tawh kizui-in kham uilut nga leh kham simbeng nga hi ding hi. Bang hang hiam cih leh note khempeuh leh na uliante uh tungah a kibang gimna hong tung hi

Tua ahih ciangin note in na gamsung uh hong sugawp na uilut uh limte leh na simbeng limte uh bawlin, Israel-te' Pasian' tungah zahtakna na lak ding uh hi. Note leh na pasian-te uh leh na gam uh hong gawtna amah in hong zangsak khading hi

Egypt-te leh Faro in a lungsim uh a khauhsak bangin bang hangin na lungsim uh khauhsak ding na hi uh hiam? Amah in amaute a mawlpih khit ciangin amaute in Israel mite paisakin, tua ciangin Israel mite kihemkhia uh hilo ahi hiam

Tua ahih ciangin tu-in leeng thak khat bawlin a tungah kol a kibang ngei nailo bawngpi a no nawi a pia lai nih la un la, a bawngpite leengah vawh un; ahih hangin amaute kiang panin a note la-in inn-ah ciahpih un

Tua ciangin Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang la-in leeng tungah koih un la, mawhna hanga biakna-in na piak uh kham milimte a singkuang khat sungah guangin a gei-ah koih un. Tua ciangin sawlkhia un la, a lampi-ah paisak un

A bawngte in Bethshemesh khua zuanin a paitoh leh siatna lianpi hong bawlpa pen amah hi ding hi. Ahih hangin a paitoh kei leh eite hong susiapa amah hilo a, eite tungah a piang mawkmawk hi, ci-in i thei ding hi,” a ci uh hi
Mite in tua bangmahin hih uh a, a no nawi a pia lai bawngpi nih la-in leengah bulh uh hi
Amaute in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang, leh kham simbeng leh amau' uilut limte a omna singkuang leeng tungah a koih uh hi

Tua ciangin bawngpite lamlian dung zui-in Bethshemesh lamah tang takin pai uh a, a paikawmun ham uh hi; taklam hita leh veilamah hita leh kiheilo uh a, Filistia uliante in Bethshemesh gamgi ciangdong a nung a zui uh hi
Tu-in Bethshemesh uliante in kuam sungah a mangbuh uh a lak laitak ahi hi. Amaute khuadakin Thuciamna Singkuang a muh uh ciangin, a muhna uh hangin amaute lungdam uh hi
Bethshemesh khuami Joshua' lo-ah a leeng hong tungin tua munah khawl hi. Tua lai-ah suangtum lianpi khat om hi. Amaute in a leeng singte ekkhamin a bawngpite Topa' tungah meihal biakna-in a pia uh hi

Levi mite in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang leh a gei-a om kham milim a omna singkuang la-in suangtumpi tungah a koih uh hi. Bethshemesh mite in tua ni-in Topa' tungah meihal biaknate leh biakpiaknate a pia uh hi
Filistia ulian ngate in tua bang teng a muh khit uh ciangin tua ni mahin Ekron-ah a ciahkik uh hi
Filistia-te in mawhna hanga biakna-in Topa' tungah a piak uh kham uilutte in: Ashdod-a' ding khat, Gaza-a' ding khat, Ashkelon-a' ding khat, Gad-a' ding khat, leh Ekron-a' ding khat ahi hi

Ulian ngate' uk Filistia mite khuakulh tawh a ki-um khuapite leh a ki-umlo khuaneute-a' dingin a khua phazah tawh kizui-in kham simbengte zong ahi hi. Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang a koihna gei uha suangtumpi pen Bethshemesh khuami Joshua' lo-ah tuni dongin teci ahi hi
Amaute in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang en uh ahih manin amah in Bethshemesh mite pawlkhat that hi. Amah in amaute sawmsagih that a, mite lakah Topa in mi tampi that ahih manin mite thuum uh hi
Tua ciangin Bethshemesh mite in, “Hih a siangtho Pasian, Topa' mai-ah kua omzo ding ahi hiam? Eite' kiang panin kua kiangah amah paisak ding ihi hiam?” a ci uh hi

Tua ahih ciangin amaute in Kiriathjearim-ah a teng mite kiangah kamtaite sawl uh a, “Filistia-te in Topa' Thuciamna Singkuang hong puakkik khin uh hi. Hong paisuk un la, no kiangah puato un,” a ci uh hi.
